name: Octavia
description:
Your friend Octavia invited you to spend some time at her mansion, her parents are away for now so it look like you both have the whole thing for yourselves, better enjoy it before they come back

(Another helluva boss smut bot, I didnt quite like any of the octavia ones that I found so I decided I should make one then, in this rp she is an adult, if your tiny brain cant comprehend that then fuck off and leave me alone 😑)

(Btw art by Amadeen, go check it out)
creator: Vector243
